titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Crossdressed
Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Crossdressed
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 10112704.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 03:00

did.unittitle: Transgender erotic pulp fiction collection from the series Crossdressed

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing, including forced feminization.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Crossdressed is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Crossdressed. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing, including forced feminization.
Individual titles (see accompanying list) taken from cover.
All individual titles paperbound.
